ACT I
Scene II: Alexandria. A Room in the Monument.
SCENE: Dispersed, in several parts of the Roman Empire.
ACT I
SCENE I. Alexandria. A Room in Cleopatra’s palace: Enter Demetrius and Philo.
SCENE II. Alexandria. Another Room in Cleopatra’s palace: Enter Enobarbus, a Soothsayer, Charmian, Iras, Mardian and Alexas.
SCENE III. Alexandria. A Room in Cleopatra’s palace: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian, Alexas and Iras.
SCENE IV. Rome. An Apartment in Caesar’s House: Enter Octavius [Caesar], Lepidus and their train.
SCENE V. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian, Iras and Mardian.
ACT II
SCENE I. Messina. A Room in Pompey’s house: Enter Pompey, Menecrates and Menas in warlike manner.
SCENE II. Rome. A Room in the House of Lepidus: Enter Enobarbus and Lepidus.
SCENE III. Rome. A Room in Caesar’s House: Enter Antony, Caesar, Octavia between them.
SCENE IV. Rome. A street: Enter Lepidus, Maecenas and Agrippa.
SCENE V. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian, Iras, Alexas.
SCENE VI. Near Misenum.
SCENE VII. On board Pompey’s Galley, lying near Misenum: Music. Enter two or three Servants with a banquet.
ACT III
SCENE I. A plain in Syria.
SCENE II. Rome. An Ante-chamber in Caesar’s house: Enter Agrippa at one door, Enobarbus at another.
SCENE III. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian, Iras and Alexas.
SCENE IV. Athens. A Room in Antony’s House: Enter Antony and Octavia.
SCENE V. Athens. Another Room in Antony’s House: Enter Enobarbus and Eros meeting.
SCENE VI. Rome. A Room in Caesar’s House: Enter Agrippa, Maecenas and Caesar.
SCENE VII. Antony’s Camp near the Promontory of Actium: Enter Cleopatra and Enobarbus.
SCENE VIII. A plain near Actium: Enter Caesar with his army and Taurus marching.
SCENE IX. Another part of the Plain: Enter Antony and Enobarbus.
SCENE X. Another part of the Plain.
SCENE XI. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Antony with attendants.
SCENE XII. Caesar’s camp in Egypt: Enter Caesar, Agrippa, Dolabella with others.
SCENE XIII. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Cleopatra, Enobarbus, Charmian and Iras.
ACT IV
SCENE I. Caesar’s Camp at Alexandria.
SCENE II. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace.
SCENE III. Alexandria. Before the Palace: Enter a Company of Soldiers.
SCENE IV. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Antony and Cleopatra with others.
SCENE V. Antony’s camp near Alexandria: Trumpets sound. Enter Antony and Eros, a Soldier meeting them.
SCENE VI. Alexandria. Caesar’s camp: Flourish. Enter Agrippa, Caesar with Enobarbus and Dolabella.
SCENE VII. Field of battle between the Camps: Alarum. Drums and Trumpets. Enter Agrippa and others.
SCENE VIII. Under the Walls of Alexandria: Alarum. Enter Antony again in a march; Scarus with others.
SCENE IX. Caesar’s camp: Enter a Sentry and his company. Enobarbus follows.
SCENE X. Ground between the two Camps: Enter Antony and Scarus with their army.
SCENE XI. Another part of the Ground: Enter Caesar and his army.
SCENE XII. Another part of the Ground: Alarum afar off, as at a sea fight. Enter Antony and Scarus.
SCENE XIII. Alexandria. A Room in the Palace: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian, Iras and Mardian.
SCENE XIV. Alexandria. Another Room: Enter Antony and Eros.
SCENE XV. Alexandria. A monument: Enter Cleopatra and her maids aloft, with Charmian and Iras.
ACT V
SCENE I. Caesar’s Camp before Alexandria.
SCENE II. Alexandria. A Room in the Monument: Enter Cleopatra, Charmian and Iras.
